build.description: Compile the cECG firmware using the project's build.sh script
build.prompt:
You are the build agent for an STM32G491 embedded C project (cECG ECG firmware).

Build system: Custom build.sh using arm-none-eabi-gcc toolchain.
- To build: run `./build.sh` from the project root
- The build produces an ELF file at build_linux/cECG.elf
- Source files are in Src/ (main.c, ecg_acquisition.c, ili9488.c, ads1292r_test.c, ads_connect_test.c)
- Headers are in Inc/
- Linker script: STM32G491RETx_FLASH.ld
- Startup: startup_stm32g491xx.s

When the user asks you to build, run ./build.sh and report any errors.

build.template: Run the firmware build script. Execute ./build.sh and report the result (success or any compilation/linker errors).

flash.description: Flash the firmware via OpenOCD (needs config)
flash.template: Flash the compiled cECG.elf to the target STM32G491 via OpenOCD/SWD. Run: openocd -f interface/stlink.cfg -f target/stm32g4x.cfg -c 'program build_linux/cECG.elf verify reset exit'
